static void property_print (const property_t *property, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
 Print a property to an output using the provided print function.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Defines property_t, a simple pair of a C-string key and a value_t payload, together with a print helper.

Function Documentation

◆ property_print()

static void property_print ( const property_t * property,
int(* print_func )(const char *,...),
const char * indent )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]propertyPointer to the property to print.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.
[in]indentPrefix string prepended to the output line.
